title: Sports Highlight: The Jump
summary: Slow-motion silhouette of a basketball player rising for a dunk against city skyline.
prompt: A dramatic slow-motion sports highlight: a basketball player in silhouette leaps for a dunk, body fully extended, ball cocked back for the slam. Behind them, a city skyline at sunset glows in deep orange and magenta. Lens flares streak across the frame. Polished broadcast-sports cinematography, deep contrast, hero-shot energy.
